span.p:
Layer 1: Porter Stemmer FTS5
bm25(chunks, 5.0, 1.0) — title 5x weight

span.p:
RRF Fusion (K=60)
score = Σ 1/(60 + rank + 1)
Merge by source_id::title

span.p:
Proximity Reranking
findMinSpan(position_lists)
boost = 1 / (1 + minSpan / contentLength)

span.p:
Levenshtein Fuzzy Correction
1-4 chars→dist 1, 5-12→2, 13+→3
Re-run RRF with corrected terms

Smart Snippets
300-char windows, merge overlapping
Up to 1500 chars total
